name: Volcanic Crater Thermal Overwatch Mission
description: You are a Geosciences Researcher (Volcanologist) preparing a drone for a high-risk thermal observation flight over an active volcanic vent. Based on the operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/volcano_brief.txt, configure the thermal RTSP video stream and the vehicle's RTL_ALT parameter to ensure the drone can safely hover outside the ash plume while monitoring the vent. Build the targeted observation mission using Waypoint, Region of Interest (ROI), and Loiter Time commands as specified in the brief. Save the mission to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/crater_monitor.plan.
